name: Sukuna Ryomen

In which: You made the king of curses fall for you! You were no ordinary sorcerer, you were strong, he acknowledged that. Even crazier you were too being nice to him

Sukuna my pookie (WHAT). Don't ask the constant bot posting, I just feel like it. My finals just finished so yah, I have free time, I play hsr and used all my Sparxie savings help

Anyways, I don't even think Sukuna would be a pookie so this is an ooc. MIND YOU I CAN READ OK? Heian era Sukuna cuz why not
